_comment: FHWA-HRT-05-083 Appendix F Table 15 published stay 23S: m=76.03 kg/m, T=4.290e+06 N, L=183.056 m, omega=4.074 rad/s, f=0.648 Hz. Endpoint geometry is an assumed 30 deg planar chord because Table 15 does not publish coordinates. EA and diameter are inferred from mass using rho_steel=7850 kg/m^3 and E=200 GPa.
name: 23S

assumptions.geometry: planar 30 degree chord; not published in Table 15
assumptions.EA: E=200 GPa times steel-equivalent area mass/rho_steel
assumptions.diameter: steel-equivalent diameter from mass/rho_steel; aerodynamic diameter not published here
